extensionDescription.message: Displays frequently contacted family names and short notes in large text. Memo display only; no calling function.

appLead.message: Frequently contacted family names and short notes are shown in large text. Calling and sending are not available.

loadingBody.message: Checking saved names on this device.

onboardingGuide.message: Save one name and a short note first, then this board will show it in large text.

emptyBody.message: Names saved on this device appear here as easy-to-read cards.

emptyNextStep.message: Use the add-name fields below to enter a family name and short note.

editContactHint.message: Update the display text shown on the board.

addContactHint.message: Add one name and a short note for the board display.

trialEnded.message: Trial ended. Basic display and editing still work.

premiumPrice.message: Premium is planned as a one-time $3 purchase.

premiumPlaceholder.message: The payment link is a placeholder until the owner sets it up.

loadErrorBody.message: Please close and reopen this popup.
